intent: Follow up after a sales meeting with a potential client
key_facts: Met on Tuesday afternoon | Discussed CRM software solution | Live demo scheduled for next Friday at 2 PM | Pricing starts at $499 per month | Free 30-day trial available
reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up – CRM Demo Scheduled for Friday

Dear [Client Name],

Thank you for meeting with me on Tuesday afternoon to discuss how our CRM software solution can support your team's goals.

As agreed, I have confirmed our live demonstration for next Friday at 2:00 PM. You will have the opportunity to explore the platform's full feature set and ask any questions in real time.

For your reference, our plans start at $499 per month, and every new client receives a complimentary 30-day trial with no commitment required. I hope this gives you the confidence to experience the product firsthand before making any decisions.

Please do not hesitate to reach out if there is anything you would like us to cover specifically during the demo.

Kind regards,
[Your Name]

intent: Request proposal details from a software vendor
key_facts: Project deadline is 30 June | Total budget is $50,000 | Requires cloud hosting and 24/7 support | Three vendors are being evaluated | Decision will be made by 15 May
reference_email:
Subject: Request for Proposal – Cloud Hosting & Support Services

Dear [Vendor Name],

I am writing to formally request a detailed proposal for cloud hosting and 24/7 support services in connection with an upcoming project.

Our project carries a deadline of 30 June with an allocated budget of $50,000. We are currently evaluating three vendors and intend to make a final decision by 15 May, so we would appreciate receiving your proposal well in advance of that date.

Please ensure your submission includes a breakdown of hosting tiers, support response times, service-level agreements, and any relevant case studies.

We look forward to reviewing your proposal and exploring how your services might align with our requirements.

Yours sincerely,
[Your Name]

intent: Send a thank-you email after a job interview
key_facts: Interviewed for Senior Software Engineer role | Spoke with the ML team lead | Discussed Python and machine learning experience | Excited about the remote-first culture | Mentioned availability to start within two weeks
reference_email:
Subject: Thanks for the Chat – Senior Software Engineer Role

Hi [Interviewer Name],

Just wanted to say a genuine thank you for taking the time to speak with me today about the Senior Software Engineer position.

I really enjoyed the conversation with you and the ML team. Talking through the Python and machine learning work you're doing only got me more excited about the role, and the remote-first culture sounds like exactly the kind of environment where I do my best work.

As I mentioned, I'm available to start within two weeks, so timing shouldn't be an issue. I'd love to keep the momentum going and am happy to answer any follow-up questions.

Thanks again – hope to hear from you soon!
[Your Name]

intent: Apologise to a customer for a service outage
key_facts: Outage lasted 4 hours on Wednesday evening | Affected approximately 500 users | Root cause was a database failure | Issue has been fully resolved | Offering 20% discount on next invoice as compensation
reference_email:
Subject: Our Sincere Apologies for Wednesday's Service Disruption

Dear [Customer Name],

I want to reach out personally to apologise for the service outage that occurred on Wednesday evening. We understand how disruptive a 4-hour interruption can be, and we are truly sorry for the inconvenience this caused you and the approximately 500 other users who were affected.

After a thorough investigation, we identified a database failure as the root cause. Our engineering team worked quickly to resolve the issue, and the service has been fully restored.

To acknowledge the impact this had on your experience, we will be applying a 20% discount to your next invoice. We hope this gesture reflects how seriously we take your trust in us.

We remain committed to providing you with the reliable service you deserve, and we are putting additional safeguards in place to prevent a recurrence. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Warmly,
[Your Name]

intent: Introduce your company to a potential distribution partner
key_facts: Company founded in 2018 | Serves over 200 enterprise clients | Won the Industry Excellence Award in 2023 | Looking for distribution partnership in Southeast Asia | Open to an introductory call next week
reference_email:
Subject: Partnership Opportunity – Distribution in Southeast Asia

Dear [Partner Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to introduce [Company Name], a B2B technology firm founded in 2018 that currently serves over 200 enterprise clients across multiple sectors.

We are proud to have been recognised with the Industry Excellence Award in 2023, a testament to the quality and impact of our solutions. As we look to expand our reach into Southeast Asia, we are actively seeking a strategic distribution partner who shares our commitment to excellence.

We believe a partnership with your organisation could create significant mutual value, and we would welcome the opportunity to explore this in more detail. I am available for an introductory call at any time next week and would be happy to work around your schedule.

Please let me know if you would be open to connecting.

Yours sincerely,
[Your Name]

intent: Request a 30-minute meeting with a VP to discuss Q2 marketing budget
key_facts: Want to present three budget proposals | Proposals ready to share in advance | Available Tuesday or Wednesday next week | Meeting can be held virtually | Decision needed before end of month
reference_email:
Subject: Meeting Request – Q2 Marketing Budget Discussion

Dear [VP Name],

I hope you are well. I am writing to request a 30-minute meeting at your convenience to walk through our Q2 marketing budget proposals.

I have prepared three distinct proposals that I believe will support our growth targets for the quarter. I am happy to share these materials in advance so you can review them before we meet. Given that a decision is needed before the end of the month, I wanted to ensure we have sufficient time to discuss the options and align on a direction.

I am available on Tuesday or Wednesday of next week and can accommodate either an in-person or virtual meeting — whichever is most convenient for you.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Kind regards,
[Your Name]

intent: Send a weekly project status update to stakeholders

Subject: Weekly Project Status Update – Week Ending [Date]

Dear All,

Please find below this week's project status update.

Backend development is progressing well and is currently 80% complete. The UI design phase has experienced a one-week delay; however, the team is working to recover lost time and the impact on the overall schedule is being carefully managed.

The testing phase is scheduled to commence next Monday as planned. There have been no budget overruns to report at this stage, and our go-live date of 15 May remains on track.

I will continue to provide weekly updates and will flag any material changes to the schedule or budget as soon as they arise. Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Kind regards,
[Your Name]

intent: Escalate an unresolved customer support ticket
key_facts: Support ticket #45821 has been open for two weeks | Issue has caused an estimated $10,000 in lost revenue | Already contacted support three times with no resolution | Need a resolution or formal response by end of this week | Considering escalating to senior management if unresolved
reference_email:
Subject: URGENT: Unresolved Support Ticket #45821 – Immediate Action Required

Dear [Support Manager Name],

I am writing to formally escalate support ticket #45821, which has now been open for two weeks without resolution.

This ongoing issue has directly resulted in an estimated $10,000 in lost revenue for our business. Despite contacting your support team on three separate occasions, we have not received a satisfactory response or a clear path to resolution.

This situation is no longer acceptable. We require either a concrete resolution or a formal written response detailing the next steps by the end of this week. If we do not hear from you by that deadline, we will have no option but to escalate this matter to senior management and explore alternative courses of action.

We value our relationship with your organisation and sincerely hope this can be resolved promptly. I look forward to your urgent response.

Regards,
[Your Name]

Hi [Name],

It was really great meeting you at TechConf 2025 in London last week! I really enjoyed our conversation about the AI space and especially the idea of collaborating on an open-source NLP project – I've been thinking about it since we spoke.

Looking forward to staying in touch!

intent: Request a deadline extension for a client project deliverable
key_facts: Current deadline is 20 April | Requesting a two-week extension to 4 May | Reason: unexpected API changes introduced by the client | Extended timeline will allow full QA testing | Delivery quality will not be compromised
reference_email:
Subject: Request for Deadline Extension – Project Deliverable

Dear [Client Name],

I am writing to formally request a two-week extension to the current project deadline of 20 April, proposing a revised delivery date of 4 May.

The reason for this request is the unexpected API changes introduced on your side, which have required us to revisit and rework a significant portion of the integration layer. While our team has responded quickly, delivering a thoroughly tested and stable product requires additional time.

The extended timeline will allow us to complete a full round of QA testing, ensuring that the final deliverable meets the high standard of quality we both expect. We want to be transparent about this challenge rather than rush a delivery that may not reflect our best work.

We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience this may cause and remain fully committed to delivering an exceptional outcome. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this further at your earliest convenience.

Kind regards,
[Your Name]
